title: lobelia serpens
intro: Lobelia serpens, also known as blue lobelia or serpentine lobelia, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant actions. The health benefits of lobelia serpens include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of lobelia serpens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
